content:
# Qurayyah Sabkha

**Summary**: A coastal sabkha located on the western coast of the Arabian Gulf.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[1994-al-guwaizani|Al-Guwaizani, 1994]] studied the qurayyah-sabkha to understand its unique sedimentary environment.

## Geological and Structural Setting

- [[1994-al-guwaizani|Al-Guwaizani, 1994]] Low-lying coastal plain

## Formations Present

- [[1994-al-guwaizani|Al-Guwaizani, 1994]] quaternary-sediments

## Key Findings From This Location

- The sabkha is approximately 5 km in diameter and features a central halite crust. ([[1994-al-guwaizani|Al-Guwaizani, 1994, p. 14]])
